name: codegraph_pr_context
description: Analyze the current branch's changes against the code graph. Runs git diff to find changed files, then for each changed function: who calls it (blast radius), what tests cover it, which modules are affected. Returns a combined PR review context in one call — replaces manually running analyze_impact + find_related_tests on each file. USE WHEN: reviewing a PR, preparing a commit message, or checking what a branch might break before merging.

baseBranch.description: Base branch to diff against (default: 'main'). The tool runs git diff <baseBranch>...HEAD to find changed files.

compact.description: Compact output — counts only, skip per-symbol detail

format.description: Output format. 'json' (default) returns structured data. 'markdown' returns a ready-to-post PR comment (risk summary, blast radius, test gaps, stale docs, suggested reviewers) — ideal for posting directly to a GitHub PR via a CI action.
